prompt: FIXED SUBJECT - LOCKED FOREGROUND LAYER. The attached image shows a woman in a red-and-white vertical pinstripe ruffle-trim cami top and matching ruffle shorts, holding a stack of folded towels (white, sage-grey, cream with tassels). Reproduce her and everything she is wearing and holding EXACTLY: same face, hair, skin, expression, pose, hands, body, the exact garment, and the exact towels. Do NOT redraw, restyle, resize, reposition, or alter the woman, her outfit, or the towels. Her shape and pose are final. CRITICAL COLOUR LOCK: the outfit must remain a VIVID, SATURATED red-and-white pinstripe with bright true red stripes, exactly as in the source. Do NOT desaturate or shift the stripes toward pink, rose, dusty pink, salmon, or coral. Preserve the full red saturation. Place her beside a low pale-stone balustrade on a clifftop coastal terrace, open calm blue Mediterranean sea and soft sky filling the space behind her, warm stone underfoot. Three-quarter side camera, airy and open. Replace ONLY the background; remove the plain studio backdrop entirely. Match the light to the subject: soft warm Mediterranean sunlight consistent with how she is already lit, natural not harsh. Photorealistic editorial vacation lifestyle. The outfit reads as the hero of the frame.
